name: MIB-626 diabetic kidney disease trial is recruiting without posted results
summary: Recruiting phase 2 registry testing MIB-626 in type 2 diabetes and diabetic kidney disease, with no posted registry results.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT05759468 as recruiting with 156 estimated participants and no posted results in the June 8, 2026 API view.
population_or_model: Adults with type 2 diabetes and diabetic kidney disease
quantitative_note: Registry enrollment is 156; result status is not posted.
caveats: Registry status and design do not provide evidence of benefit.
Any future result should be reviewed before changing the outlook.
No-results status is useful watchlist context, not efficacy evidence.
